home.title: Scuba Adventures - Home
home.heroSubtitle: Join our premium scuba diving academy and explore a world beneath the waves.
home.aboutText: We are a collective of passionate divers and instructors dedicated to providing the safest, most memorable, and highest quality diving education. Our minimalist, modern approach ensures you learn in a focused, serene environment.
home.featuredSubtitle: A selection of ocean moments from our journeys.
home.coursesSubtitle: Handpicked certifications to start or elevate your diving journey.
home.testimonialsSubtitle: Trusted by divers who value elegance and precision.
home.ctaSubtitle: Reserve your spot on upcoming courses and trips.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: We respect your privacy and handle your data with care. This is demo content and will be updated with legal copy.
privacy.p2: We collect minimal data required to provide booking and account services. You can request data deletion at any time.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.heading: Terms of Service
terms.p1: By using Scuba Adventures you agree to our booking policies, safety requirements, and cancellation terms.
terms.p2: All training follows recognized diving standards. This is demo content pending final legal review.

booking.successText: Thank you. Your seat is reserved. We will contact you with course or trip details. No online payment is required.
booking.cancelText: You can return anytime to reserve a course or trip.
